description_long: This is a tall, barrel-shaped conga drum with a glossy, deep red wooden body and gold-colored metal hardware. The drumhead is made of natural or synthetic skin, tightly stretched across the top and secured by gold tension rods and brackets. The body features a subtle horizontal band and decorative triangular metal plates, adding to its visual appeal. There are side loop handles integrated into the hardware for carrying or adjusting the drum. A small circular badge or logo is visible on one side, indicating the brand or maker. The drum's finish is smooth and reflective, giving it a polished, professional appearance suitable for performances or street music.
description: A glossy red conga drum with gold hardware, a natural drumhead, and decorative metal accents. It features side loop handles and a visible brand badge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drumhead, gold hardware, and a visible brand badge on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gold tension rods and triangular metal plates, with no visible badge.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without the brand badge, showing the smooth, uninterrupted red surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the brand badge clearly visible on the right, and gold hardware details.
